official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound clear_dialog singleton body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns clear_dialog to packet id 0x8b.
The official clear_dialog body is empty through StreamCodec.unit(INSTANCE).

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, singleton identity, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this singleton packet-support proof to infer dialog UI behavior or show_dialog semantics.
